Jordan Smith
Cleveland, OH

Summary
Dedicated customer service representative with over 3 years of experience in retail and hospitality. Highly skilled in communication and problem-solving. Seeking to leverage experience in a new career path. Passionate about delivering exceptional service and building lasting relationships with clients.

Experience
Customer Service Associate  
Best Buy, Cleveland, OH  
June 2021 - Present  
- Provided excellent customer service by assisting customers with product inquiries and resolving issues.  
- Developed product knowledge to help customers make informed purchasing decisions.  
- Collaborated with team members to achieve sales goals and ensure a smooth shopping experience.

Barista  
Starbucks, Cleveland, OH  
March 2019 - May 2021  
- Prepared and served a variety of coffee and tea beverages while maintaining a clean and welcoming environment.  
- Trained new staff on company policies and beverage preparation techniques.  
- Engaged with customers to create a friendly atmosphere and encourage repeat business.

Certifications
- Food Safety Certification, Ohio Department of Health  
- Customer Service Excellence Training, Retail Association

- Strong verbal and written communication
